title: Origins: Portal Puzzler
description:
Adds The Portal Puzzler Origin!
Allows Travel from Portal to Portal! 16 different colour-coded Portals! Works in Multiplayer! (For Fabric)
body:
# Portal Puzzler (made for fabric 1.20.2) impact: 1, Icon: Orange Dye
_"Your ancestors in the far future developed Portal Magic! 
Thinking with Portals, you can connect so many distant spaces together!"_

+ "Magic Portals"(Portal Active Power):
"Using all the different color dyes, You can place Portals and quickly travel through space!!"
 + You can place color coded Portals by using Rightclick while holding any dye in your main hand.
 + Change and lock a Portal's destination by using Rightclick while holding a dye in your offhand.
  = The color of the dye in your offhand is always the destination.
 + Your Portals are your own! They do not connect to anyone else's Portals!
 + You can only have ONE Portal of each color active. Placing a new one destroys the last.
 + Each Portal will try to keep their chunk loaded, so that you can travel to it.
  - Logging out and in removes all of your Portal chunk loaders. Manually visit your Portals to make them active again!
 - Your Portals may look like Shulkers, but they do not drop anything!


Origin by Frucs :) inspired by Portal and some of my previous origins. (version 1.01)

This Origin does not work on: 
1.19.2 (Tested by @Mr_Spooky)
